learnings.pattern: Timestamp clamp on SECURITY DEFINER upsert functions
learnings.relevance: upsert_vocabulary_mastery correctly applies LEAST(p_updated_at, now() + interval '5 minutes') — matches the documented pattern

learnings.pattern: IS DISTINCT FROM auth.uid() for authz guard
learnings.source: E92-S01 R4, docs/solutions/ pattern for SECURITY DEFINER functions
learnings.relevance: Both functions use IS DISTINCT FROM (not !=) — handles NULL auth.uid() correctly. Applied correctly.

learnings.pattern: Append-only tables use split INSERT + SELECT RLS policies
learnings.source: P0 migration study_sessions pattern, E92-S03 design decision
learnings.relevance: flashcard_reviews correctly uses split policies. audio_bookmarks is documented as append-only but uses FOR ALL — inconsistent with the established pattern. This is a known-pattern violation.
learnings.violation_location: audio_bookmarks line 341 — uses FOR ALL instead of split INSERT+SELECT
